site.name: Kian Xu
site.description: Merchant by day. Dad by evening. Builder by night.

home.tagline: Merchant by day. Dad by evening. Builder by night.
home.bio1: I'm a <developerLink>developer and builder</developerLink>. I've worked as an engineering manager at <pinganLink>Ping An Technology</pinganLink> and <sfLink>S.F. International</sfLink>, then led the frontend team at <plaudLink>PLAUD</plaudLink> across multiple product lines. These days I run an e-commerce business and focus on SEO.
home.bio2: My goal is to build things that are fast, useful, and fun. I'm a husband and father. I'm a massive LEGO fan, currently obsessed with the F1 collection.
home.writingTitle: Some of my favorite writing includes:
home.footer: You can <blogLink>read my writing</blogLink> or explore my <projectsLink>projects</projectsLink>, or <followLink>follow me online</followLink>. <contactLink>Reach out</contactLink> if interested.
